summary: close --auto-submit submission errors are now printed to stderr on the human-readable path; previously only --json consumers saw them.
reason: POST /expensereports/{id}/submit failures were stashed in summary["submit_error"] but the non-JSON output branch never read it. Users running close --auto-submit interactively saw "bundled N into report_id=..." and assumed success, while the report sat on Zoho as a draft. Filed per Greptile P1.
